formal_proof_artifacts.role: geometric tail formula for momentum-refined K grid (K=3,4 at N=4)

theorem_content.abstract: The momentum-refined certificate uses a refined K grid at fixed N=4. The K-tail improves at N=4 (k_tail_improved_at_n4=True), the N-tail is small (occupation_tail_small_at_k4=True), and the K bound is satisfied (k_bound_satisfied=True). The geometric tail formula is proved.
theorem_content.honest_failure: status=failed_to_certify despite k_bound_satisfied=True, because the overall relative error (20%) exceeds the certification threshold.
